word: H6299 - פָּדָה - pâdâh - paw-daw' - [idiom] at all

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּדה

Transliteration: pâdâh

Phonetic: paw-daw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to ransom, redeem, rescue, deliver
    1. (Qal) to ransom
    2. (Niphal) to be ransomed
    3. (Hiphil) to allow one to be ransomed
    4. (Hophal) redeemed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1734

Part(s) of speech: Verb
